item.title: 🥺Some things never changed.. Lola never stopped wanting to be close to Cloud. She still looks for him the same way she did as a kitten. For some reason now, Cloud just isn’t as tolerant and usually leaves after a little while #cat #pets #kitten #thenandno

item.title: Ravi the cat has never been elected to any office, but he shows up to the Pennsylvania State Capitol to work anyway.🐈 He just cares that much about the people (and tiny bow ties).🐾 📸 ravibenham / WHTM ABC27 @jessicalbenham #cat #cats #animals #goodnews #
